states.name: Callen
states.title: Seaside Scholar
states.description: To Callen, who spent her days cooped up in her lab, the sun-soaked paradise of Orka was practically an alternate dimension. But despite her protests, she actually found it somewhat enjoyable - the headlong rush into a new, unknown world.

states.name: Callen
states.title: Seaside Scholar
states.description: Callen's workaholic tendencies didn't lend themselves well to a balanced diet, leaving her snacking on chips and candy rather than proper meals. Once, she was taunted by Druke for her eating habits. "I-I can handle this just fine!", she insisted, popping Brussels sprouts into her mouth. She passed out and it took half an hour for her to wake back up.

states.name: Callen
states.title: Seaside Scholar
states.description: Callen viewed her current form as a sort of punishment. Punishment for her overconfidence in her own abilities, her over-focus on results, and the hubris that cost her her valued mentor. But her mentor, in their last moments, did not hate Callen. Proud though she may be, beneath it is a kind and dutiful woman.
